summary: Update mode testing complete for v2.2 new features. All 28 backend tests passed, all 30 frontend tests passed (10 core-flows, 8 route-history, 12 map-simulation). New features tested: Settings page CRUD, Video stream placeholder, Route export (JSON/KML), WebSocket endpoint available on localhost:8001. Ukrainian UI confirmed.
seed_data_creation: Test routes created dynamically with TEST_ prefix and timestamps for isolation, cleaned up after each test
context_for_next_testing_agent: All v2.2 features tested and working: Settings page with camera/MAVLink/Optical Flow/LiDAR/Smart RTL sections, Video stream placeholder in Telemetry tab, Route export buttons (JSON/KML) visible on hover in route history, WebSocket /ws/telemetry available on localhost:8001 (not proxied via external URL). Version badge updated to v2.2. All existing features still work: tabs, routes, sensors, smart-rtl, docs.

settings_crud.GET_api_settings: PASS - Returns all settings with camera, MAVLink, Optical Flow, LiDAR, Smart RTL, System sections
settings_crud.POST_api_settings: PASS - Saves settings to MongoDB and persists
settings_crud.POST_api_settings_reset: PASS - Resets all settings to defaults

video_stream.ui_component: PASS - Video stream placeholder visible in Telemetry tab with OFFLINE badge

route_export.GET_api_routes_id_export_json: PASS - Returns route data as JSON
route_export.GET_api_routes_id_export_kml: PASS - Returns valid KML XML with coordinates for Google Earth
route_export.ui_buttons: PASS - Export JSON and KML buttons visible on hover in route history (data-testid='export-json-{id}', 'export-kml-{id}')

websocket.ws_telemetry: NOT_TESTED_VIA_PROXY - WebSocket /ws/telemetry works on localhost:8001 but not through external preview URL proxy

settings_ui.tab_settings: PASS - Settings tab visible with correct icon
settings_ui.settings_section: PASS - All sections render: Camera, MAVLink, Optical Flow (MATEK 3901-L0X), LiDAR (TF-Luna), Smart RTL, System
settings_ui.save_reset_buttons: PASS - Save and Reset buttons work with toast notifications
